info.title: Sphere Integration Hub (SIH) CLI v.1.5.6.122
info.description: CLI tool to orchestrate API calls using versioned Swagger catalogs and YAML workflows.

options.name: --execution
options.description: Path to the .workflow.report.json file (alternative to positional arg).

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for the HTML file (defaults to same dir as JSON).

options.name: --no-open
options.description:
Do not open the report in the browser after generation.
Global:

options.name: --version
options.description: Print only the CLI version.

options.name: --help
options.description:
Show this help.
PinedaTec.eu © 2026

options.name: --workflow
options.description: Workflow file to execute.

options.name: --env
options.description: Environment key to resolve base url.

options.name: --catalog
options.description: Optional catalog path (defaults to embedded catalog).

options.name: --envfile
options.description: Optional env file override for the root workflow.

options.name: --varsfile
options.description: Optional vars file override (must be .wfvars).

options.name: --report-format
options.description: Execution report artifact format: json, html, both, or none.

options.name: --capture-http
options.description: Capture level for HTTP details in reports: none, headers, or bodies.

options.name: --refresh-cache
options.description: Redownload swagger definitions even if cached.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Print the execution plan without calling endpoints.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Print detailed plan information.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Print stage debug sections before invocation.

options.name: --mocked
options.description:
Use mock payloads/outputs when defined.
--no-redact Disable redaction of sensitive headers and payload fields in reports.
--no-summary Disable the post-execution summary block.
sih report <path>  Generate an interactive HTML trace report from an execution JSON artifact.

options.name: --execution
options.description: Path to the .workflow.report.json file (alternative to positional arg).

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for the HTML file (defaults to same dir as JSON).

options.name: --no-open
options.description:
Do not open the report in the browser after generation.
Global:
